title: geum sunhangii
intro: Geum sunhangii, also known as the Korean mountain avocado or Korean geum, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Geum sunhangii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile addition to traditional herbal medicine.
